creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port with respect to vertual fonts family (tjsy,tjsypk,rot)
which is the rest part of vftool. This port depends Japanese DNP fonts which
were made by ja-pkfonts${RESOLUTION}-1.0(japanese/pkfonts). RESOLUTION_JA 
corresponds to RESOLUTION in pkfonts port.

I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

Packed tarball is :
-rw-r--r--  1 kiri  staff  3035 Aug  8 01:36 ja-vftool-misc-1.2-980808.tar.gz
